creator: wolfgang.meyer@hob.de
text:
Created attachment 180385
Logfile for jsoncpp-build

Some poudriere builds for aarch64 with qemu-user-static fail with

qemu: unhandled CPU exception 0x10005 - aborting

A downgraded qemu-user-static to ports r424575 builds the concerning ports without crash.

Among the ports that show this behaviour seem to be the ones using scons for build (e.g. devel/jsoncpp or net/fspd). In the workdir for the jsoncpp case remains a qemu_python2.7.core dump. Another crashing port is java/openjdk8-jre but this one uses a self-provided bootstrap-openjdk and changes to the ports Makefile, hence is not reproducible from the official ports tree.
